final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing full-screen brand advertisement banner for a flagship smartphone launch, sized for mobile display.

Style/medium: needs a "品牌曝光型视觉冲击" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Samsung Galaxy S-series launch campaign visuals, Apple iPhone cinematic product reveal aesthetics, 2020s premium tech brand full-bleed digital OOH; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be full-screen vertical layout with maximum visual impact hierarchy — hero product centered, brand elements commanding attention
Subject: must include a premium flagship smartphone as the hero product, front-facing full-screen display prominent
Scene/backdrop: needs a dramatic, high-impact backdrop — exact environment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a high-impact, cinematic product-reveal atmosphere — exact lighting is yours
Color palette: needs a premium tech brand palette with strong visual punch — exact color choices are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sleek, glass-and-metal premium device material feel — exact surface treatment is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must be portrait orientation optimized for mobile full-screen display (1080×1920 ratio)
Avoid: competitor brand logos, cluttered layout, low-contrast compositions
